tripOverview.intro: London beckons with its perfect blend of historic charm and modern vibrancy, offering romantic walks along the Thames and world-class cultural experiences. From Borough Market's artisanal delights to cozy pub corners, this iconic city provides the ideal backdrop for an unforgettable romantic getaway.
tripOverview.vibe: A whirlwind romantic adventure through London's iconic landmarks, hidden gems, and vibrant LGBTQ+ scene, perfect for couples who love culture, great food, and making memories on the move.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April is perfect for London with mild spring weather, blooming flowers in the parks, and fewer crowds than summer months.

attractions.name: Tower of London
attractions.desc: Historic fortress housing the Crown Jewels and centuries of royal history.

attractions.name: British Museum
attractions.desc: World-renowned museum featuring treasures from across the globe and throughout history.

attractions.name: Westminster Abbey
attractions.desc: Gothic abbey church where British monarchs have been crowned for nearly 1,000 years.

attractions.name: Borough Market
attractions.desc: London's oldest food market offering artisanal produce and international cuisine.

attractions.name: Hyde Park
attractions.desc: Royal park perfect for romantic walks, Speaker's Corner, and the Diana Memorial.

destinationOverview.transportation: London's extensive public transport system includes the Underground (Tube), buses, and overground trains, all covered by contactless payment or Oyster cards. Black cabs are iconic but expensive, while Uber and other ride-sharing apps are widely available and LGBTQ+ friendly. Walking is often the quickest way to get around central London, and Boris bikes offer a fun way to explore the city.
destinationOverview.tip: Get an Oyster card or use contactless payment for seamless travel on all public transport - it's much cheaper than buying individual tickets and caps your daily spending.
destinationOverview.safety: London is very safe for LGBTQ+ travelers with a vibrant community and anti-discrimination laws protecting all visitors.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with an Airalo eSIM for instant internet access to navigate London's transport system and share your romantic moments without roaming charges.

days.intro: Start your London adventure with iconic royal sights and a romantic evening in Covent Garden.

morning.name: Westminster Abbey Visit
morning.desc: Explore the historic abbey where royal weddings and coronations take place.

morning.name: Big Ben & Parliament Square
morning.desc: Photo stop at London's most iconic landmarks.

afternoon.name: St. James's Park Walk
afternoon.desc: Romantic stroll through London's most beautiful royal park.

afternoon.name: Buckingham Palace
afternoon.desc: Visit the Queen's official residence and see the famous balcony.

evening.name: Covent Garden Exploration
evening.desc: Enjoy street performers and romantic atmosphere in this historic market.

evening.name: Rules Restaurant Dinner
evening.desc: Dine at London's oldest restaurant for a truly traditional experience.

days.tip: Book restaurant reservations in advance, especially for romantic spots - many popular venues fill up quickly.

days.intro: Explore Borough Market's culinary delights and immerse yourselves in world-class culture at the British Museum.

morning.name: Borough Market Visit
morning.desc: Browse London's most famous food market with incredible vegetarian options.

morning.name: Southwark Cathedral
morning.desc: Visit London's oldest Gothic church with beautiful architecture.

afternoon.name: British Museum
afternoon.desc: Spend hours exploring world treasures and ancient artifacts together.

afternoon.name: Russell Square Gardens
afternoon.desc: Relax in this peaceful Bloomsbury garden square.

evening.name: Fitzrovia Food Tour
evening.desc: Self-guided food walk through trendy neighborhood with great vegetarian spots.

evening.name: The George Tavern
evening.desc: Historic LGBTQ+ friendly pub with character and great atmosphere.

days.tip: The British Museum is huge - focus on 2-3 sections rather than trying to see everything, and use their free WiFi to access audio guides.

days.intro: Cruise the Thames and explore the historic Tower of London with its crown jewels and fascinating history.

morning.name: Tower of London
morning.desc: Discover 1,000 years of history and see the dazzling Crown Jewels.

morning.name: Tower Bridge
morning.desc: Walk across the glass floor of London's most famous bridge.

afternoon.name: Thames River Cruise
afternoon.desc: Romantic cruise along the Thames seeing London from the water.

afternoon.name: Shakespeare's Globe
afternoon.desc: Tour this faithful recreation of the original Elizabethan playhouse.

evening.name: Tate Modern
evening.desc: Browse contemporary art in this converted power station with Thames views.

evening.name: OXO Tower Restaurant
evening.desc: Romantic dinner with stunning panoramic views of London.

days.tip: Book the Thames cruise for golden hour to see London's landmarks beautifully lit as the sun sets over the city.

days.intro: Spend a romantic day exploring royal palaces and London's most beautiful parks.

morning.name: Kensington Palace
morning.desc: Explore the palace where Diana lived and see royal exhibitions.

morning.name: Kensington Gardens
morning.desc: Stroll through beautiful gardens and see the Diana Memorial.

afternoon.name: Hyde Park
afternoon.desc: Rent a pedal boat on the Serpentine Lake for romantic fun.

afternoon.name: Speaker's Corner
afternoon.desc: Historic site of free speech and political demonstrations.

evening.name: Marble Arch & Oxford Street
evening.desc: Quick shopping and sightseeing in London's busiest shopping district.

evening.name: The Ivy
evening.desc: Iconic celebrity-spotting restaurant for a glamorous dinner.

days.tip: Pack a small picnic from local shops to enjoy by the Serpentine - it's romantic and budget-friendly with beautiful park views.

days.intro: Immerse yourselves in London's theatrical heart with shows, street performers, and cultural attractions.

morning.name: National Gallery
morning.desc: World-class art collection including Van Gogh and Da Vinci masterpieces.

morning.name: Trafalgar Square
morning.desc: London's most famous square with Nelson's Column and lion statues.

afternoon.name: Covent Garden Market
afternoon.desc: Browse unique shops and watch street performers in this covered market.

afternoon.name: Royal Opera House Tour
afternoon.desc: Behind-the-scenes look at one of the world's great opera houses.

evening.name: Pre-Theatre Dinner
evening.desc: Early dinner in theatreland before your show.

evening.name: West End Show
evening.desc: Catch a world-class musical or play in London's theatre district.

days.tip: Book same-day theatre tickets at discounted prices from TKTS in Leicester Square - perfect for spontaneous romantic evening entertainment.

days.intro: Explore London's vibrant alternative scene in Shoreditch and discover cutting-edge art galleries.

morning.name: Tate Britain
morning.desc: British art from 1500 to present including the famous Turner collection.

morning.name: Victoria Embankment Walk
morning.desc: Scenic Thames-side walk with great city views.

afternoon.name: Shoreditch Street Art Tour
afternoon.desc: Self-guided exploration of London's most colorful street art district.

afternoon.name: Brick Lane Market
afternoon.desc: Vintage shopping and multicultural atmosphere in trendy East London.

evening.name: Soho LGBTQ+ Scene
evening.desc: Explore Old Compton Street and its famous gay bars and cafes.

evening.name: Heaven Nightclub
evening.desc: London's legendary LGBTQ+ club under the arches near Charing Cross.

days.tip: Shoreditch is perfect for couples who love Instagram-worthy street art - bring a portable phone charger for all the photo opportunities.

days.intro: Take a romantic day trip to Greenwich for maritime history, royal parks, and stunning London views.

morning.name: Greenwich Train Journey
morning.desc: Scenic train ride through London to historic Greenwich.

morning.name: Royal Observatory
morning.desc: Stand on the Prime Meridian line and explore space and time exhibits.

afternoon.name: Greenwich Park
afternoon.desc: Climb the hill for the best panoramic views of London's skyline.

afternoon.name: National Maritime Museum
afternoon.desc: Explore Britain's naval history in the world's largest maritime museum.

evening.name: Thames Clipper Return
evening.desc: Romantic boat ride back to central London along the Thames.

evening.name: Gordon Ramsay Savoy Grill
evening.desc: Luxurious farewell dinner at this iconic Art Deco restaurant.

days.tip: Time your Greenwich Park visit for late afternoon to catch the sunset over London - it's one of the most romantic views in the city.

days.intro: Enjoy a relaxed final morning with last-minute shopping and coffee before your departure.

morning.name: Portobello Road Market
morning.desc: Browse antiques and vintage finds in this famous Notting Hill market.

morning.name: Notting Hill Walk
morning.desc: See the colorful houses and film locations from the romantic movie.

afternoon.name: Airport Transfer
afternoon.desc: Heathrow Express or taxi to the airport for your flight home.

afternoon.name: Airport Shopping
afternoon.desc: Last-minute duty-free shopping and London souvenirs.

evening.name: Departure Flight
evening.desc: Flight back to Philadelphia with amazing London memories.

days.tip: Pack light souvenirs in your carry-on - London's airports can be busy, so allow extra time for security and gate changes.

food.intro: London's food scene is incredibly diverse with excellent vegetarian options, world-class Indian cuisine, and trendy coffee culture perfect for food-loving couples.
food.tip: Many pubs and restaurants offer early bird menus before 7pm - perfect for budget-conscious couples who want to experience upscale dining at lower prices.

neighborhoods.name: Covent Garden
neighborhoods.desc: Heart of theatreland with street performers, shopping, and romantic atmosphere
neighborhoods.whyStay: Walking distance to major attractions and vibrant nightlife

neighborhoods.name: South Kensington
neighborhoods.desc: Museum district with elegant Victorian architecture and upscale dining
neighborhoods.whyStay: Near major museums and beautiful parks, romantic neighborhood feel

neighborhoods.name: Shoreditch
neighborhoods.desc: Trendy East London area with street art, vintage shops, and LGBTQ+ scene
neighborhoods.whyStay: Hip area with great nightlife and authentic London alternative vibe

budget.name: Premier Inn London County Hall
budget.vibe: Modern chain hotel with Thames views
